name: docs-sync
description: Documentation that stops lying: a watcher diffs recent code changes against the docs, a writer fixes the drift, an accuracy reviewer verifies every claim against source before you approve.

nodes.label: Drift watcher
nodes.promptContext: Repurposed as a drift detector: diff the last week of merged changes against README, docs/, CLI help text, and code comments that document behavior. Output a drift list: 'doc location X claims A; commit Y made it B'. Only verifiable factual drift — no style opinions.

nodes.label: Fix drift
nodes.promptContext: Work DRIFT.md item by item. Every corrected claim cites the source file and line that makes it true now.

nodes.label: Accuracy check
nodes.promptContext: For each changed doc claim, open the cited source and confirm the doc now tells the truth. Run documented commands where cheap. A single unverifiable claim is a REJECT.

checklist: Every change maps to a DRIFT.md item
